task.name: Split PageHeader sticky boundary so actions scroll with content
task.action: In src/components/shared/PageHeader.tsx: 1. Change the component return from a single div to a Fragment. 2. The sticky div should wrap ONLY the title row: keep className "sticky top-0 z-10 bg-background pt-6" but REMOVE "mb-3 md:mb-5" from it. 3. Move the actions block OUTSIDE and BELOW the sticky div. Add "mb-3 md:mb-5" to the actions div (alongside existing "flex justify-end mt-4"). 4. When actions is NOT provided, render a simple spacer div with className "mb-3 md:mb-5" after the sticky div to preserve existing spacing. 5. No changes to the PageHeaderProps interface.
task.verify: Run "npm run lint" and "npm run build". Both must pass with zero errors.

task.name: Remove wrapper div around PageHeader on Transactions page
task.action: In src/app/transactions/page.tsx: 1. Remove the wrapping div with className "mb-6" around PageHeader (lines 9-11). 2. Render PageHeader as a direct child of the outer container div, matching the pattern used by Dashboard, Accounts, and Cards pages.
task.verify: Run "npm run lint" and "npm run build". Both must pass with zero errors.
